raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.0,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Do you want (A) a light copyedit that tightens wording and flow while preserving order and all technical claims, or (B) a deeper rewrite that can reorganize the passage and lightly reframe the contribution narrative?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Clean this up' most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register improvements without altering technical content.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should preserve and, where appropriate, clarify existing uncertainty statements rather than dilute them.",
    "RX.2": "Language cleanup must not strengthen claims beyond what the text reports or imply unsupported performance.",
    "RX.3": "Work should remain within editing/polish scope and avoid adding analyses or changing the substantive argument.",
    "RX.4": "Avoid phrasing that could mislead readers about deployment readiness or market impacts.",
    "RX.5": "Retain all original data points, model names, and qualifiers so changes remain traceable to the source text."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Do you want (A) a light copyedit that tightens wording and flow while preserving order and all technical claims, or (B) a deeper rewrite that can reorganize the passage and lightly reframe the contribution narrative?

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Clean this up' most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register improvements without altering technical content.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should preserve and, where appropriate, clarify existing uncertainty statements rather than dilute them.
rationale.RX.2: Language cleanup must not strengthen claims beyond what the text reports or imply unsupported performance.
rationale.RX.3: Work should remain within editing/polish scope and avoid adding analyses or changing the substantive argument.
rationale.RX.4: Avoid phrasing that could mislead readers about deployment readiness or market impacts.
rationale.RX.5: Retain all original data points, model names, and qualifiers so changes remain traceable to the source text.
